inputs.model.prompt:

hand-drawn chalk lines preserved,
subtle motion within a chalk drawing,
heart chalk drawing gently pulsing,
rose chalk sketch petals slowly opening and closing,
chalk spiral rotating perceptibly,
chalk eye blinking slowly,
chalk butterfly wings barely moving,
chalk smoke wisps drifting upward from the dagger,
chalk watch moving in a ticking movement,
shadows shifting within chalk drawing,
chalk grain and roughness fully preserved throughout,
no smoothing, chalk texture alive not realistic,
slow hypnotic chalk animation, dark paper background,
film grain, chalk imperfections intact,
no camera movement, no zoom, no pan

digital art, oil painting, watercolor, acrylic,
smooth surfaces, clean edges, sharp definition,
glossy, shiny, polished, blended smooth,
camera movement, zoom, pan, shake,
bright light, neon, oversaturated colors,
morphing shapes, distortion, flickering,
lifelike texture, natural skin, fabric texture,
removing chalk texture, removing grain,
smoothing out chalk strokes
